name: novel_outline_planner
description: Creates detailed web novel outlines including volume structure, chapter breakdown, plot pacing, and arc planning. Invoke when user needs novel outline creation, chapter planning, or story structure design.
instructions: Create a structured outline based on the provided design plan
Define volume structure with clear goals and climaxes for each volume
Plan chapter-by-chapter breakdown with specific events and character development
Implement proper pacing with well-distributed excitement points
Ensure the outline follows proven web novel structure and reader engagement patterns

design_plan.description: Design plan file path or JSON data
